messages.session_start_guidance: Run HEARTBEAT.md checks. Call asafelobotomy_session_reflect if thresholds trigger.
messages.post_tool_reflect_instruction: Call asafelobotomy_session_reflect (deferred; load with tool_search if needed), then continue. If it fails and .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py exists, run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py. If both fail, review scope and identity files manually.
messages.accepted_reason: User retro: run asafelobotomy_session_reflect, persist, stop. If it fails and .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py exists, run python3 .github/hooks/scripts/session_reflect_fallback.py.
